examples: The police didn't believe her when she said the rapist was a stranger.
The girl’s mother was also expelled from the church; the rapist was not.
Then she asked, "Did you...? I mean, you were pretending to be a rapist"?
One commutation request Huckabee rejected as governor was that of convicted rapist Wayne DuMond.
Police fear there may be more victims of a rapist convicted of attacking four women.
